# Bramble & Bitters — Corporate Gifting (One Pager)

**Who we are**
A neighborhood specialty shop in Oakland curating small-batch pantry goods and giftable items.

## Bundles
- **Mini** ($35) — small thank-you gift
- **Classic** ($55) — best for teams
- **Deluxe** ($85) — client-facing gifts

## Lead times
- Typical: **6–10 business days** (depends on quantity + customization)

## Logistics
- Pickup in Oakland
- Local delivery (East Bay)
- Shipping: **limited** (CA + nearby)
